nodes.title: Load LLM Qwen3.5-0.8B
widgets_values:
import torch
from transformers import AutoTokenizer, AutoModelForCausalLM

MODEL_NAME = "Qwen/Qwen3.5-0.8B"

device = "cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu"
dtype = torch.float16 if device == "cuda" else torch.float32

print("Loading model:", MODEL_NAME)
print("Device:", device)

tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(MODEL_NAME, trust_remote_code=True)
model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(
    MODEL_NAME,
    torch_dtype=dtype,
    trust_remote_code=True,
).to(device)

model.eval()

print("hidden_size =", model.config.hidden_size)
print("num_hidden_layers =", model.config.num_hidden_layers)

​Loading model: Qwen/Qwen3.5-0.8B
Device: cuda
hidden_size = 1024
num_hidden_layers = 24

nodes.title: Load Alice in Wonderland text of ~1k tokens
widgets_values:
import requests

GUTENBERG_URL = "https://www.gutenberg.org/files/11/11-0.txt"

text = requests.get(GUTENBERG_URL).text

# tokenize and truncate
encoded = tokenizer(text, return_tensors="pt", truncation=True, max_length=1024)

input_ids = encoded["input_ids"].to(device)
attention_mask = encoded["attention_mask"].to(device)

print("Token count:", input_ids.shape[1])

nodes.title: Pass text through LLM and record all the activations of all layers
widgets_values:
with torch.no_grad():
    outputs = model(
        input_ids=input_ids,
        attention_mask=attention_mask,
        output_hidden_states=True,
        return_dict=True
    )

hidden_states = outputs.hidden_states

# shape: (layers, tokens, hidden_dim)
activations = torch.stack([h[0].cpu() for h in hidden_states])

# remove embedding layer (optional)
activations = activations[1:]

print("Activations shape:", activations.shape)

import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from matplotlib.animation import FuncAnimation
from IPython.display import HTML

# activations: (layers, tokens, hidden)
acts = activations.numpy()
L, T, H = acts.shape

# normalize each token vector
norms = np.linalg.norm(acts, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
acts = acts / np.clip(norms, 1e-8, None)

# flatten all layers and tokens into one big cloud
# X shape: (L*T, H)
X = acts.reshape(L * T, H)

# center globally
X = X - X.mean(axis=0, keepdims=True)

# color each point by its layer
layer_ids = np.repeat(np.arange(L), T)
colors = plt.cm.viridis(np.linspace(0, 1, L))[layer_ids]

rng = np.random.default_rng(0)

# fixed 2D viewing plane in hidden space
view_basis = rng.normal(size=(H, 2))
view_basis, _ = np.linalg.qr(view_basis)

# accumulated high-D rotation
R = np.eye(H)

# persistent rotation plane + inertia
u = rng.normal(size=H)
u /= np.linalg.norm(u)

v = rng.normal(size=H)
v = v - u * np.dot(u, v)
v /= np.linalg.norm(v)

vel_u = np.zeros(H)
vel_v = np.zeros(H)
theta_vel = 0.6

def small_plane_rotation(u, v, theta, H):
    I = np.eye(H)
    uu = np.outer(u, u)
    vv = np.outer(v, v)
    uv = np.outer(u, v)
    vu = np.outer(v, u)
    return I + (np.cos(theta) - 1.0) * (uu + vv) + np.sin(theta) * (vu - uv)

# estimate stable global display bounds from a few sampled rotated views
R_probe = np.eye(H)
u_probe = u.copy()
v_probe = v.copy()
vel_u_probe = vel_u.copy()
vel_v_probe = vel_v.copy()
theta_vel_probe = theta_vel

samples = []
n_probe = 40

for _ in range(n_probe):
    vel_u_probe = 0.985 * vel_u_probe + 0.001 * rng.normal(size=H)
    vel_v_probe = 0.985 * vel_v_probe + 0.001 * rng.normal(size=H)

    u_probe = u_probe + vel_u_probe
    u_probe /= np.linalg.norm(u_probe)

    v_probe = v_probe + vel_v_probe
    v_probe = v_probe - u_probe * np.dot(u_probe, v_probe)
    v_probe /= np.linalg.norm(v_probe)

    theta_vel_probe = 0.995 * theta_vel_probe + 0.005 * 0.003

    dR_probe = small_plane_rotation(u_probe, v_probe, theta_vel_probe, H)
    R_probe = R_probe @ dR_probe

    pts2 = X @ R_probe @ view_basis
    samples.append(pts2)

samples = np.concatenate(samples, axis=0)

# robust global scale and limits
scale = np.percentile(np.abs(samples), 95)
scale = max(scale, 1e-8)

samples_scaled = samples / scale
m = np.max(np.abs(samples_scaled))
m = 1.1 * m

# initial projection
pts0 = (X @ R @ view_basis) / scale

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 7))
fig.patch.set_facecolor("#111111")
ax.set_facecolor("#111111")
ax.axis("off")
plt.subplots_adjust(0, 0, 1, 1)
ax.set_position([0, 0, 1, 1])

scat = ax.scatter(
    pts0[:, 0],
    pts0[:, 1],
    s=7,
    c=colors,
    alpha=0.75,
    linewidths=0
)

ax.set_xlim(-m, m)
ax.set_ylim(-m, m)

def update(frame):
    global R, u, v, vel_u, vel_v, theta_vel

    # smooth drift in the rotation plane
    vel_u = 0.985 * vel_u + 0.001 * rng.normal(size=H)
    vel_v = 0.985 * vel_v + 0.001 * rng.normal(size=H)

    u = u + vel_u
    u /= np.linalg.norm(u)

    v = v + vel_v
    v = v - u * np.dot(u, v)
    v /= np.linalg.norm(v)

    # smooth angular speed
    theta_vel = 0.995 * theta_vel + 0.005 * 0.003

    dR = small_plane_rotation(u, v, theta_vel, H)
    R = R @ dR

    pts2 = (X @ R @ view_basis) / scale
    scat.set_offsets(pts2)

    return scat,

ani = FuncAnimation(fig, update, frames=24, interval=50)
Result = HTML(ani.to_jshtml())

acts = activations.numpy()  # (layers, tokens, hidden)

norms = np.linalg.norm(acts, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
acts = acts / np.clip(norms, 1e-8, None)
